title: ERCOT AS Total Capability CSV download
description:
Total capability of resources in ERCOT available to provide both individual ancillary services as well as combinations of ancillary services. This data is per SCED run, so it may be irregular to 5-minute frequency.

Capacity per resource is determined by telemetry and then capped by the individual resource limits. Energy Storage Resources (ESRs) are further capped by Ancillary Service SCED duration requirements and current State of Charge (SOC).

Implemented on December 5th, 2025, as part of ERCOT's RTC+B project.
